messages.content:
List actions organizations should take to mitigate this vulnerability.

Hyland Perceptive Filters releases before 2023-12-08 (e.g., 11.4.0.2647), as used in Cisco IronPort Email Security Appliance Software, Cisco Secure Email Gateway, and various non-Cisco products, allow attackers to trigger a segmentation fault and execute arbitrary code via a crafted document.

Organizations should update to a version of Hyland Perceptive Filters released on or after 2023-12-08 to mitigate this vulnerability. Regularly applying security patches and maintaining a robust Incident Response Plan (IRP) are also recommended.
